findings.title: Python None Attribute Access
findings.description: Potential None dereference. The value may be None (e.g., from dict.get()) and accessing attributes on None raises AttributeError. Add a None check.

findings.title: Python Queryset Negative Slice
findings.description: Django QuerySets do not support negative indexing or negative slicing. Using a negative index on a QuerySet raises AssertionError. Convert to a list first or use alternative logic to access elements from the end.
